name: Latitude 32
description_short: Latitude 32 is a credit union offering online banking, bill pay, loans, and credit cards with FinanceWorks financial management software and 24/7 digital account services.
description_long:
Latitude 32 Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving consumers in the Charleston, South Carolina area (based on the 843 area code). Like traditional credit unions, it operates on a cooperative model where members are owners rather than customers of a for-profit entity. The organization has invested in modern digital infrastructure to serve its membership base.

Latitude 32 provides core banking services including online banking with transaction history, balance checking, fund transfers, and check clearing. Members can enroll in Online Bill Pay to eliminate paper checks, access FinanceWorks financial management software integrated with accounts, order checks through Harland Clarke's platform, apply for loans and credit cards via eForms, and view eStatements online 24/7. The institution recently upgraded security on its online banking platform. Future capabilities under "Coming Soon" include the ability to apply for membership and open new accounts entirely online.

The credit union distinguishes itself through its emphasis on digital accessibility and integrated financial management tools. FinanceWorks provides members with consolidated account management capabilities beyond basic banking. The institution actively communicates security best practices, including a prominent scam alert that educates members about what the credit union will never request (full account numbers, social security numbers, validation codes, phone numbers) and warns about phone number spoofing.

Latitude 32 appears to be a regional credit union focused on digital member convenience. However, the website content provided covers only online services and does not detail loan terms, APRs, fees, membership requirements, or product-specific features like minimum balances or interest rates. Consumers should contact the credit union directly at (843) 556-4809 or visit in person to understand full product offerings, eligibility requirements, and competitive rates compared to other financial institutions.
services: Online Banking with balance checking and transaction history
Check clearing and viewing cleared checks
pros: FinanceWorks financial management software integrated directly with accounts for comprehensive money management
Online Banking platform includes security upgrade and fund transfer capabilities available 24/7
Online Bill Pay eliminates paper check writing and postage costs for members
eForms allow 24/7 loan and credit card applications from any device with internet access
eStatements enable 24/7 online statement viewing after login
Member-owned credit union structure typically offers better rates and lower fees than traditional banks
Proactive security education with clear scam alert about what the institution will never request
cons: Limited geographic service area (appears to be Charleston, SC region only based on area code)
Website does not disclose loan APRs, credit card rates, fees, or membership eligibility criteria
Online account opening capability currently listed as 'Coming Soon,' limiting digital enrollment
No information provided about minimum balance requirements, deposit insurance details, or product-specific terms
Limited phone hours or branch locations not specified on the provided website content
best_for: Charleston, SC area residents seeking a member-owned financial institution with modern online banking
Consumers who want integrated financial management software (FinanceWorks) with their primary banking
Members preferring to eliminate paper bills and manage finances entirely through online platforms
Borrowers interested in credit union loan and credit card products with potentially competitive rates
diagnosis: Latitude 32 Credit Union is best for residents in the Charleston, SC area who want modern digital banking with integrated financial management tools and member-ownership benefits. The primary caveat is that the website does not disclose critical product details like interest rates, APRs, fees, or membership requirements—prospective members must contact the credit union directly to compare offerings with competing institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
